name: URBNCO — Streetwear
description: Dark, edgy streetwear landing page with bold typography, product feature grid, size selector, reviews, and FAQ

settings.headline:
Marga
Relaxed
Pants
settings.subtext: Cut from 100% cotton dobby in a wide, unhurried silhouette. Brown and white stripes woven with natural texture and depth. Goes everywhere.

feature_highlight.label: The Fabric
feature_highlight.title: 100% Cotton Dobby
feature_highlight.text: Woven with a distinctive surface texture that gives each stripe depth and character. Lightweight, breathable, and built to soften with every wash.

features_grid.title: RELAXED FIT
features_grid.text: Wide, unhurried silhouette. Not slim, not loose — just right.

features_grid.title: ELASTIC WAIST
features_grid.text: Covered elastic with internal drawstring. Comfort without compromise.

features_grid.title: DEEP POCKETS
features_grid.text: 2 side pockets + 1 back pocket. All functional.

features_grid.title: DOBBY WEAVE
features_grid.text: Textured stripe pattern with natural depth and character.

reviews.name: Aarav D.
reviews.text: The cotton dobby texture is insane in person. Photos don't do it justice. Comfortable enough for all day, stylish enough for going out. Perfect.

reviews.name: Vikram S.
reviews.text: Finally a brand that gets relaxed fit right. Not baggy, not sloppy — just chill. The elastic waist with drawstring is genius. Wearing these daily.

reviews.name: Rohan K.
reviews.text: Ordered on a Wednesday, got it Friday. Quality is premium level. The striped dobby fabric has this nice weight to it — feels expensive. Way underpriced at 1,650.

items.question: What is the fit like?
items.answer: The Marga Pants have a relaxed, wide-leg silhouette. They sit comfortably at the waist with a covered elastic + drawstring for adjustment. Not slim, not baggy — intentionally unhurried.

items.question: Will the stripes fade after washing?
items.answer: No. The stripes are woven into the fabric (dobby weave), not printed. The pattern is part of the textile itself, so it won't fade, bleed, or wash out.

items.question: What sizes do you offer?
items.answer: We offer S, M, L, XL, and XXL. Check the size chart on the product page for exact waist and inseam measurements.

items.question: Do you offer returns?
items.answer: Yes. 7-day easy returns. Unworn, unwashed items with tags intact qualify for a full refund. We handle pickup.

items.question: What's the shipping time?
items.answer: All orders are dispatched within 24 hours. Standard delivery takes 3-7 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹500.

settings.tagline: Streetwear for the unbothered. Every piece made in India with premium materials and zero compromise.
